channel.title: Docs on Daniel Miller — Technical Writer
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on Daniel Miller — Technical Writer

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Experience#

iManage#

Senior Technical Writer June 2026 - Present

  • Write, test, and structure end-user documentation for the iManage platform, covering navigation, user settings, and management of clients, workspaces, and documents

Varonis Systems#

Technical Content Manager, Cloud Security
January 2025 – October 2025

  • Created and edited technical blogs, whitepapers, and content focused on cloud security, APIs, and SaaS platforms
  • Improved content retrieval and visibility using metadata tagging and structured authoring principles
  • Collaborated with researchers, designers, and engineers to deliver content aligned with enterprise goals
  • Managed content workflows and performance in Asana and HubSpot
  • Partnered on AI-assisted content projects, refining tone, accuracy, and style to improve retrieval by LLMs

IBM#

Information Developer, Technical Writer
Oct 2021 – Oct 2024

item.title: Writing Samples
item.description:
Writing Samples#

A selection of published work. Everything here is publicly available — links go to the live docs and articles.

Note: Documentation is a living product — pieces published during my time at IBM (2021–2024) have continued to evolve since. Links reflect the current published versions.

Product & Concept Documentation#

  • About IBM Cloud Object Storage — Product overview written for both technical and non-technical readers.
  • Satellite storage templates overview — UX-focused conceptual content designed to improve onboarding and reduce support friction.
  • OpenShift Data Foundation on Satellite — Task-based configuration guide for a deeply technical audience.

API Documentation#

  • IBM Cloud Kubernetes Service API — Create a Satellite cluster — REST API reference documentation: endpoint behavior, parameters, and payload structure for cluster infrastructure.
  • IBM Cloud Object Storage — S3-compatibility API — Developer-facing guide mapping IBM COS behavior to the S3 API, written for engineers migrating existing tooling.

Tutorials & Walkthroughs#

  • How to create an S3 bucket — Step-by-step product walkthrough with screenshots and context on why each setting matters.

Security & Industry Writing (Varonis)#

  • ForcedLeak — Research writeup translating original security research for a broad audience.
  • What is Database Activity Monitoring (DAM)? — Explainer on a data protection category.
  • The Salesloft Drift breach and SaaS risk — News analysis connecting a breach to broader SaaS security lessons.
  • DSPM and Kubernetes — Bridging data security posture management and container platforms.
